name: MMC Sanayi Ve Ticari Yatirimlar A.S.
summary: MMC Sanayi ve Ticari Yatirimlar A.S. trades in fruits and vegetables from agricultural products in Turkey. The company also provides domestic and international transportation and agency services; buys, sells, and rents domestic and international real estate; and imports and exports in the field of pharmaceutical industry. In addition, it engages in the marketing and participation investments of all kinds of goods and services using various communication channels in the field of electronic commerce. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
